title: Ainiv 20Pcs Sticky Stretchy Toys Set, Sticky Spider Web, Novelty Toys for Kids, Party Bag Fillers, Kids Birthday Party Favor Gifts for Kid Party Supplies, Classroom Rewards
features: 📦【20PCS STICKY TOY KIT】20pcs sticky spider web in random colors are included, large in number, and highly playable. These colorful and fun sticky toys are easy to put into gift box reward box gift bags and will be a hit with kids at parties.

️🖐️【HUGE JOY】 Sticky hands are sticky, stretchy, slimy, and most of all lots of fun. Let kids play for hours and they'll love tossing and tossing them, or just spinning them so they stick to ceilings, walls, windows, tables, and just about any smooth surface.

✅【100% SAFE】These sticky toy is made of high-quality special soft rubber, soft to the touch, high in elasticity, good in recovery, harmless, and an ideal safe toy for children and adults (not edible, please do not put it in your mouth!)

💦【EASY TO CLEAN】Our stretchy toys provide hours of entertainment for the whole family! When it gets dirty, you can restore its viscosity by simply washing it with soap and water, drying or air-drying.

🎁【GREAT GIFT IDEA】These toys help stimulate children's imagination, develop their creativity and imagination. It provides entertainment while broadening and sharpening their minds. Perfect for themed parties, birthday parties, celebrations, stocking stuffers, halloween favors, party favors, party bag fillers, and more, both boys and girls will love it!
description: Product description Ainiv Party Bag Fillers, Novelty Assorted Toys for Boys & Girl Solve the difficulty of collecting small toys or prizes for kids' birthday parties and prize boxes. - Large quantity, high playability, and bright colors. - Keeps kid entertained for hours, can stick to ceiling, walls, Windows, tables & virtually any smooth surface. - Reusable: Regain elasticity after washing and drying. - Discover the range: party bags/classroom prizes & rewards/party favors/birthday party games / small gifts for all occasions / for young and old / boys and girls. Specification: Color: Random Features: High elasticity, not easy to tear Package: 20pcs sticky sticky spider web toys Directions Wash with soap and water to clean and regain elasticity. Can be stuck to ceilings, walls, windows, tables, and any smooth surface.
